name: Adrien Duval | Miscarriage | Psychological Trauma
description:
The happy family idyll collapsed on the day when the long-awaited child never came into the world. Now Adrien faces a much more difficult task: not only to cope with his pain, but also to help his wife step by step return to life, despite the wound left in their hearts.

«ATTN» Photo taken from Pinterest.

(since I take photos from the Internet, I do not always know whether it has already been used here (although I try to check through photo search), so if suddenly you notice that this photo is already there, just let me know about it, without negativity!! because personally, if I see art with a watermark, I NEVER remove them myself)

Not specified:

how many years did your marriage last; did you work before or did you devote yourself entirely to the house; at what stage and what gender was the child you lost; is it possible for you to have children in the future.

⚠️ Warning: The story raises difficult topics - loss of a child, miscarriage, emotional trauma and grief. The text may be painful and cause strong emotions in readers who have encountered similar situations. It is recommended to use with caution.

ˏ⸉ˋ‿̩͙‿̩̩̽‿̩͙‿̩̥̩‿̩̩̽‿̩͙‿̩͙‿̩̩̽‿̩͙‿̩͙‿̩̩̽‿̩͙‿̩̥̩‿̩̩̽‿̩͙‘⸊ˎ

Today I want to write, probably, a long afterword. I'm not sure that everyone will read it, but I think my viewers will pay attention to it.

In my latest bots, I often see comments that my works are too similar to existing ones. I understand that this may be related to the ideas themselves. I always write the first messages, descriptions and annotations myself and never borrow them from other authors. And regarding the photographs, I already wrote about this above.

The ideas of my bots can indeed be inspired by something that already exists. Most often, I take popular concepts and rethink them for myself and my plot. Do I steal someone's ideas intentionally? No. But perhaps some stories were born due to the fact that I once came across a similar plot somewhere. And that's okay!

I understand that those who want to accuse will do so even without explanation. But I warn you: in the future, I will simply delete such comments. Because I don't see anything wrong with being inspired by other authors. It is impossible to name anyone specifically, because there are already a lot of similar bots.

Sorry for such a long text. I hope you enjoy the bot and I'd love to hear your comments - especially the ones where you share what you like and don't like. Love you! ♡
creator: Martini_kik
